overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street on a partly cloudy day. The camera moves along a road past modern black glass buildings, billboards, and waterfront views, approaching an overpass and tunnel entrance. The footage is from a video game with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic city street with the camera walking forward along a sidewalk. Purple billboards and a distinctive black angular building dominate the left side, while the green tower_02 stands visible in the distance on the right. Wooden benches line the right side of the path as vehicles occasionally pass by on the adjacent road.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to reveal a waterfront view with the tower_02 now centered and a distant city skyline across the water. After observing the scenery, the camera pans back to face forward, leaving the initial billboards and benches behind while continuing along the promenade.

segments.scene_description: Moving forward toward a large elevated highway overpass, the camera passes yellow and black traffic barriers on the right. The tower_02 recedes into the distance on the right while vehicles including a green car pass by on the left. Overhead highway signs become visible as the approach continues.

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and approaching a tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the elevated highway into a more enclosed space with mixed lighting. A tunnel entrance looms ahead while a large KOLA billboard appears on the right. The tower_02 and street lights are now behind as the scene transitions to the sheltered underpass environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a futuristic city street that transitions from an open, billboard-lined promenade into a sheltered urban underpass. It begins on a wide sidewalk flanked by purple billboards and a black angular building, with wooden benches lining the path as the camera moves toward a distant green tower. As the camera briefly turns right to reveal a waterfront view and a far-off city skyline, it pans back forward to continue along the promenade, leaving the initial structures behind. The scene then shifts toward a large elevated highway overpass, passing yellow and black traffic barriers while vehicles glide by under emerging overhead signs. Finally, the camera moves beneath the highway into a more enclosed space, passing a large KOLA billboard as it approaches a looming tunnel entrance.
